title: The Editor’s Note – from 2002!
description: In 2002, for the first-ever issue of Janaagraha Times, Ramesh Ramanathan, co-founder of Janaagraha, shared his thoughts on the need for such a publication. Dear Reader  When we launched Janaagraha on December 8th last year, it was the beginning of a new approach to bringing citizens and government closer together. Why is this important? Because […]
